achievements.title: Thanks for Playing
achievements.description: Beat the game and reach the credits.
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: It's-a Me, Yoshi
achievements.description: Find and talk to Yoshi.
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Chuckya? Chuckno!
achievements.description: Escape the grasp of King Bob-omb or a Chuckya by pressing the A Button or pushing the Analog Stick 11 times before they throw Mario.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Half Empty or Half Full?
achievements.description: Access Wet-Dry World when the water is empty, in the middle, and at full capacity in a single session.
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: The Clock Is Ticking
achievements.description: Access Tick Tock Clock with all possible time states in a single session.
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Flawless Victory - Round 1
achievements.description: Beat Bowser in the Dark World without being damaged throughout the stage.
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Flawless Victory - Round 2
achievements.description: Beat Bowser in the Fire Sea without being damaged throughout the stage.
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Flawless Victory - Final Round
achievements.description: Beat Bowser in the Sky without being damaged throughout the stage.
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: The Power of All 120 Stars
achievements.description: Beat Bowser in the Sky after getting all 120 Power Stars.
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Out of Shape
achievements.description: Beat the Fat Penguin fairly after getting 120 Power Stars.
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Long Walk to the Mountain
achievements.description: Climb to the top of the mountain in Bob-omb Battlefield without pressing 'A' or using a Warp.
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Jump to the Island in the Sky
achievements.description: Collect the Star 'Shoot to the Island in the Sky' in Bob-omb Battlefield without using any cannon.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Mario Shoots to the Sky
achievements.description: Collect the Star 'Mario Wings to the Sky' in Bob-omb Battlefield without using the Wing Cap.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Cannonless into the Wild Blue
achievements.description: Collect the Star 'Shoot into the Wild Blue' in Whomp's Fortress without using the cannon.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Jump onto the Caged Island
achievements.description: Collect the Star 'Fall onto the Caged Island' in Whomp's Fortress without using the owl.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Jump onto the Stone Cliff
achievements.description: Collect the Star 'Blast to the Stone Pillar' in Jolly Roger Bay without using the cannon.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Swim Through the Jet Stream
achievements.description: Collect the Star 'Through the Jet Stream' in Jolly Roger Bay without using the Metal Cap.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Wall Kicks Will Work, but Flying Too
achievements.description: Collect the Star 'Wall Kicks Will Work' in Cool, Cool Mountain without touching the slope with the recovery heart.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Secret Way Around the Haunted Books
achievements.description: Collect the Star 'Secret of the Haunted Books' in Big Boo's Haunt without solving the puzzle.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: A-Maze-Ing Jumps to the Exit
achievements.description: Collect the Star 'A-Maze-Ing Emergency Exit' in Hazy Maze Cave without inhalating the toxic gas.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Delivery for the Ancient Pharaoh
achievements.description: Collect the Star 'Shining Atop the Pyramid' in Shifting Sand Land while holding the small crate.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Secret Passage to the Temple Treasure
achievements.description: Collect the Star 'Inside the Ancient Pyramid' in Shifting Sand Land without going below the top platform in the pyramid.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Submarine Jumps for Red Coins
achievements.description: Collect the Star 'Pole-Jumping for Red Coins' in Dire, Dire Docks before the submarine moves away.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Pole-Jumping for a Vanished Star
achievements.description: Collect the Star 'Board Bowser's Sub' in Dire, Dire Docks after the submarine has moved away.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Swim Through the Jet Stream II
achievements.description: Collect the Star 'Through the Jet Stream' in Dire, Dire Docks without using the Metal Cap.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Mystery of the Mysterious Mountainside
achievements.description: Collect the Star 'Mysterious Mountainside' in Tall, Tall Mountain without using the slide.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Friendly Visit to the Lonely Mushroom
achievements.description: Collect the Star 'Blast to the Lonely Mushroom' in Tall, Tall Mountain without using the cannon.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Board the Cruiser in the Sky
achievements.description: Collect the Star 'Cruiser Crossing the Rainbow' in Rainbow Ride without using any carpet.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Falling Like an Iron Bar
achievements.description: Collect the Red Coin Star in Cavern of the Metal Cap without using a second Metal Cap.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Hot Shell Ride for Golden Coins
achievements.description: Collect 90 coins while riding a Koopa Shell in Lethal Lava Land.

achievements.title: Cool Shell Ride for Golden Coins
achievements.description: Collect 75 coins while riding a Koopa Shell in Snowman's Land.

achievements.description: Collect all 80 coins in The Princess's Secret Slide.

achievements.title: Is There a Secret?
achievements.description: Read the sign near the log on the small island in Tiny-Huge Island.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Mario's Speedrun in the Plains
achievements.description: Win against Koopa the Quick in 34 seconds or less in Bob-omb Battlefield without using the Wing Cap.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Mario's Speedrun on the Island
achievements.description: Win against Koopa the Quick in 20 seconds or less in Tiny-Huge Island without using the Koopa Shell.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Mario's Speedslide
achievements.description: Finish The Princess's Secret Slide in 17 seconds or less.
achievements.author: SporyTike
